note: Advisory read-only deploy-receipt auditor. Emits PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED deploy classifications, never a bare governance PASS. Re-implements the gate's deploy-success predicate; never invokes promotion_gate.py with deploy flags.
title: Deploy-receipt auditor (read-only rollup)

subject.note: grounds in write_deploy_receipt() success predicate; classifies the real step10a receipt read-only. Gate binary never run; verdicts written to scratch verdicts/. Subject receipt sha verified unchanged.

what_it_proves: REAL step10a watched-deploy receipt (content_identity_confirmed=false) -> FAIL, citing content-identity-not-confirmed, with the exact rollback_hint 'wrangler versions deploy 628ebc37-5c66-44e5-9cad-4e05fc2f3e92 --name sourcea-brain-chat-v1' pinned to its recorded pre_live_version_id
a MINIMAL MUTATION of the real receipt (flip content_identity_confirmed true) -> PASS with no rollback_hint
flipping content_identity_confirmed back to false re-FAILs -> the success predicate is NEVER relaxed to admit a receipt
a nonzero deploy_exit_code -> FAIL even when identity is confirmed; a receipt with no deploy_exit_code -> BLOCKED (nothing to roll back)
running the auditor leaves the step10a receipt byte-identical (sha unchanged); verdict emitted to scratch verdicts/
verdict vocab PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED, stamped origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none — never a bare governance PASS
chess_patches_applied: runs against the REAL step10a deploy receipt and records FAIL (no strawman authored from scratch)
positive proof is a minimally-mutated conformant artifact (one field flipped); no predicate relaxation
re-implements write_deploy_receipt()'s deploy_success predicate in a FRESH read-only module; never runs promotion_gate.py with deploy flags, never runs any deploy binary
emits a NEW verdict receipt to scratch verdicts/, never edits the subject (Lock 5 append-only)
reads content identity from either content_identity_ok or content_identity_confirmed to span gate schema generations without relaxing the success test
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (step10a receipt unmodified, verdict to scratch)
no live call (gate binary never invoked, no network, no deploy)
exit_gate_B1: DX-4 done (classifies real known-bad deploy receipt FAIL by minimal mutation, emits exact gate rollback_hint). Sibling B1 items: GV-1 (done), GV-2, GV-6, BR-4, TH-5.
next_action: GV-2 (knowledge-bundle 3-hash validator), GV-6 (DLM apply-map fence validator), BR-4, or TH-5
